steps.title: Notice the time shift
steps.content: The first sentences describe inherited traits passing from parents to a child. The final sentence shifts to that child's possible descendants, so the transition must point forward in time.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: A introduces an example, C introduces clarification, and D introduces contrast. The final sentence is not doing any of those; it is projecting inheritance into the future.

steps.title: Signal future inheritance
steps.content: Someday marks the move from present inheritance to a future generation of descendants. The answer is B.
